title: HyperRealism
description: A realistic and hardcore vanilla++ Minecraft modpack
body:
HyperRealism modpack is suitable for those who want to make Minecraft more realistic but also vanilla-styled

Features:
- completely changes the generation of the world
- adds new structures and reworks a lot of vanilla structures
- adds new mechanics to the player (such as thirst and sanity) and world (seasons)
- adds a lot of small realistic improvements
- reworks the sound part of the game
- modpack is well optimized
- includes my exclusive mod that adds a ton of compatibility bridges between mods for best experience
- includes my resourcepack with translations & RyoamicLights options
- and much more!..

Note: modpack is still in development, so there are a lot of incompatibilities and bugs

Mod list:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Also available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/hyperrealism-reimagined)
